issues: Product cards lack visual depth and internal hierarchy is weak.
Typography for product details and small elements is generic and has low contrast.
Layout has minor alignment issues and cramped elements (e.g., size buttons).
strengths: Strong hero section with clear focal point and elegant typography.
Consistent dark theme with appropriate accent color for a luxury brand.
All data fields are populated, giving a complete and realistic feel.
specific_improvements: Enhance product card design with subtle shadows, more generous spacing, and clearer size selection indicators.
Refine typography by increasing contrast on active filter text, using a more distinctive font for product names, and increasing legibility of small text.
Ensure pixel-perfect alignment of all header elements and consider a subtle gradient for gold buttons to add depth.
